title: El Paso Heat Wave
lead: El Paso is experiencing a severe heat wave with a Z-Score of +3.00. This critical event has a score of 10.0/10, indicating extreme conditions.
body:
The current heat wave in El Paso has reached critical levels, with a Z-Score of +3.00 and a score of 10.0/10. 
 The temperature is extremely high, with a Cooling Degree Days (CDD) value of 9.5 GG, while the Heating Degree Days (HDD) is 0.0 GG. 
 The relative humidity is 18% and the wind speed is 23.8 km/h, exacerbating the heat wave's effects.
conclusion: Implement immediate heat mitigation measures to ensure public safety.
